x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Declaration Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records the announcement of a dividend, including amount, type, and key dates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Entitlement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that determines and records eligible shareholders and their dividend rights.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Accrual Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that calculates and records the dividend amount payable to each entitled party.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Reinvestment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where dividends are reinvested into additional shares or units instead of being paid out.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that distributes dividend amounts to shareholders in cash or other forms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies dividend amounts or allocations due to corrections or changes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Reversal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reverses a previously recorded dividend transaction, restoring balances or correcting errors.
